name: canshare-who-appendix-site-histology
title: NZ WHO appendix site histology
description: Histologies used for appendix neoplasms (from WHO Classification of Tumours, Digestive Tumours, latest edition, including sections 5. Tumours of the appendix,11. Haematolymphoid tumours of the digestive system, 12. Mesenchymal tumours of the digestive system or an 'Other' value.
